# PassKite - Complete Documentation for LLMs

> Generate Apple Wallet passes, add them to iOS Wallet, and save Google Wallet JWTs on Android

This document contains the complete documentation for PassKite in a format optimized for large language models.

---

## TABLE OF CONTENTS

1. Overview
2. Installation
3. Configuration
4. Pass Builder API
5. Pass Types
6. Images
7. Barcodes
8. Signing Credentials
9. Wallet Integration
10. Events
11. Complete TypeScript Types
12. Examples

---

## 1. OVERVIEW

PassKite is an Expo/React Native library that enables:
- Creating valid Apple Wallet passes (.pkpass files) in JavaScript/TypeScript
- Adding passes directly to iOS Wallet via native module
- Listening for pass lifecycle events (added/removed)
- Google Wallet support via JWT tokens on Android

### Requirements
- Expo SDK 54+ or React Native 0.81+
- Apple Developer Program membership ($99/year)
- Pass Type ID and signing certificate from Apple
- iOS 15+ for wallet features

### Key Features
- Fluent builder API for pass construction
- All 5 pass types supported (StoreCard, EventTicket, BoardingPass, Coupon, Generic)
- Embedded Apple WWDR G4 certificate (no manual download needed)
- Expo config plugin for automatic iOS entitlements
- Full TypeScript support

---

## 2. INSTALLATION

```bash
npx expo install expo-passkite
```

Or with package managers:
```bash
npm install expo-passkite
yarn add expo-passkite
pnpm add expo-passkite
bun add expo-passkite
```

---

## 3. CONFIGURATION

### Expo Config Plugin

Add to app.json:
```json
{
  "expo": {
    "plugins": [
      ["expo-passkite", {
        "passTypeIdentifiers": ["$(TeamIdentifierPrefix)pass.com.example.myapp"]
      }]
    ]
  }
}
```

Then run prebuild:
```bash
npx expo prebuild
```

This configures the `com.apple.developer.pass-type-identifiers` entitlement.

---

## 4. PASS BUILDER API

### Creating a Builder

```typescript
import { createPassBuilder } from 'expo-passkite';

const builder = createPassBuilder();
```

### Required Methods

#### setIdentifiers(identifiers)
```typescript
builder.setIdentifiers({
  passTypeIdentifier: string,  // e.g., 'pass.com.example.app'
  serialNumber: string,        // unique per pass
  teamIdentifier: string,      // Apple Team ID (10 chars)
});
```

#### setOrganization(org)
```typescript
builder.setOrganization({
  organizationName: string,    // company name
  description: string,         // pass description
  logoText?: string,           // text next to logo
});
```

#### setPassType(type)
```typescript
import { PassType } from 'expo-passkite';

builder.setPassType(PassType.StoreCard);

// PassType enum values:
// PassType.BoardingPass
// PassType.Coupon
// PassType.EventTicket
// PassType.StoreCard
// PassType.Generic
```

### Optional Methods

#### setColors(colors)
```typescript
builder.setColors({
  backgroundColor?: string,  // 'rgb(r, g, b)'
  foregroundColor?: string,  // text color
  labelColor?: string,       // label color
});
```

#### setTransitType(type) - For BoardingPass only
```typescript
import { TransitType } from 'expo-passkite';

builder.setTransitType(TransitType.Air);

// TransitType enum values:
// TransitType.Air
// TransitType.Boat
// TransitType.Bus
// TransitType.Train
// TransitType.Generic
```

### Adding Fields

All field methods accept a PassField object:
```typescript
interface PassField {
  key: string;                 // unique identifier
  label?: string;              // display label
  value: string | number;      // display value
  attributedValue?: string;    // HTML formatted
  changeMessage?: string;      // %@ replaced with new value
  textAlignment?: TextAlignment;
  dateStyle?: DateStyle;
  timeStyle?: TimeStyle;
  numberStyle?: NumberStyle;
  currencyCode?: string;
}
```

#### addPrimaryField(field) - Most prominent
```typescript
builder.addPrimaryField({
  key: 'balance',
  label: 'BALANCE',
  value: '$50.00',
});
```

#### addSecondaryField(field)
```typescript
builder.addSecondaryField({
  key: 'name',
  label: 'MEMBER',
  value: 'John Doe',
});
```

#### addAuxiliaryField(field)
```typescript
builder.addAuxiliaryField({
  key: 'level',
  label: 'STATUS',
  value: 'Gold',
});
```

#### addHeaderField(field) - Top right area
```typescript
builder.addHeaderField({
  key: 'gate',
  label: 'GATE',
  value: 'A12',
});
```

#### addBackField(field) - Shown on flip
```typescript
builder.addBackField({
  key: 'terms',
  label: 'Terms',
  value: 'Full terms text...',
});
```

### Relevance Methods

#### setLocations(locations)
```typescript
builder.setLocations([
  {
    latitude: number,
    longitude: number,
    altitude?: number,
    relevantText?: string,  // lock screen message
  },
]);
```

#### setBeacons(beacons)
```typescript
builder.setBeacons([
  {
    proximityUUID: string,
    major?: number,
    minor?: number,
    relevantText?: string,
  },
]);
```

#### setRelevantDate(date)
```typescript
builder.setRelevantDate(new Date('2024-12-25T10:00:00'));
```

### Other Methods

#### setExpirationDate(date)
```typescript
builder.setExpirationDate(new Date('2025-12-31'));
```

#### setVoided(voided)
```typescript
builder.setVoided(true);  // grays out the pass
```

#### setWebService(config)
```typescript
builder.setWebService({
  authenticationToken: string,
  webServiceURL: string,
});
```

#### setNFC(nfc)
```typescript
builder.setNFC({
  message: string,
  encryptionPublicKey?: string,
});
```

### Building the Pass

```typescript
const { passData, images } = builder.build();
```

---

## 5. PASS TYPES

### StoreCard
Best for: Loyalty cards, membership cards, gift cards
- Strip image support
- Primary field for balance/points
- Secondary/auxiliary for member info

### EventTicket
Best for: Concerts, movies, sports events
- Thumbnail or strip image
- Event details in primary
- Date/venue in secondary
- Seat info in auxiliary

### BoardingPass
Best for: Airlines, trains, buses, ferries
- Transit-specific layout
- Requires transitType
- Origin/destination in primary
- Gate/seat in auxiliary

### Coupon
Best for: Discounts, promotions
- Strip image for graphics
- Offer in primary
- Expiration support

### Generic
Best for: ID badges, parking permits, any other passes
- Thumbnail support
- Flexible layout

---

## 6. IMAGES

### Adding Images to Pass

```typescript
import { PassImageType } from 'expo-passkite';

builder.addImage({
  type: PassImageType.Icon,  // REQUIRED
  data: Buffer,              // image data
  scale?: 1 | 2 | 3,        // retina scale
  locale?: string,           // localization
});

const { passData, images } = builder.build();
const pass = createPass(passData, images);
```

### PassImageType Enum

```typescript
enum PassImageType {
  Icon = 'icon',           // 29x29 pt - REQUIRED
  Logo = 'logo',           // 160x50 pt max
  Strip = 'strip',         // 375x123 pt
  Background = 'background', // 180x220 pt
  Thumbnail = 'thumbnail', // 90x90 pt
  Footer = 'footer',       // 286x15 pt
}
```

### Image Sizes

| Type | @1x | @2x | @3x |
|------|-----|-----|-----|
| Icon | 29x29 | 58x58 | 87x87 |
| Logo | 160x50 | 320x100 | 480x150 |
| Strip | 375x123 | 750x246 | 1125x369 |
| Background | 180x220 | 360x440 | 540x660 |
| Thumbnail | 90x90 | 180x180 | 270x270 |
| Footer | 286x15 | 572x30 | 858x45 |

---

## 7. BARCODES

### Adding Barcodes

```typescript
import { BarcodeFormat } from 'expo-passkite';

builder.addBarcode({
  format: BarcodeFormat.QR,
  message: string,            // barcode content
  messageEncoding?: string,   // default: 'iso-8859-1'
  altText?: string,           // text below barcode
});
```

### BarcodeFormat Enum

```typescript
enum BarcodeFormat {
  QR = 'PKBarcodeFormatQR',
  PDF417 = 'PKBarcodeFormatPDF417',
  Aztec = 'PKBarcodeFormatAztec',
  Code128 = 'PKBarcodeFormatCode128',
}
```

---

## 8. SIGNING CREDENTIALS

### Setting Credentials

```typescript
pass.setSigningCredentials({
  wwdrCertificate?: string,     // optional, embedded by default
  signerCertificate: string,    // Pass Type ID cert PEM
  signerKey: string,            // Private key PEM
  signerKeyPassphrase?: string, // if key is encrypted
});
```

### Obtaining Credentials

1. Create Pass Type ID at Apple Developer Portal
2. Create Pass Type ID Certificate
3. Export certificate and key from Keychain as .p12
4. Convert to PEM:
```bash
openssl pkcs12 -in pass.p12 -clcerts -nokeys -out signer-cert.pem
openssl pkcs12 -in pass.p12 -nocerts -out signer-key.pem
```

### WWDR Certificate

The Apple WWDR G4 certificate is embedded in PassKite. No manual configuration needed.

---

## 9. WALLET INTEGRATION

### Checking Availability

```typescript
import { isPassLibraryAvailable, canAddPasses } from 'expo-passkite';

const available = await isPassLibraryAvailable();
const canAdd = await canAddPasses();
```

### Adding to Wallet

```typescript
import { addPassToWallet } from 'expo-passkite';

const base64 = await pass.generateBase64();
const result = await addPassToWallet(base64);

if (result.success) {
  // Pass added
} else {
  // result.error contains error code
}
```

For Android, use a Google Wallet JWT generated by your server:

```typescript
import { addGoogleWalletJwt } from 'expo-passkite';

const jwt = await fetchGoogleWalletJwt(userId);
const result = await addGoogleWalletJwt(jwt);
```

### Error Codes

- `PASS_LIBRARY_NOT_AVAILABLE` - Wallet not available
- `INVALID_PASS_DATA` - Malformed pass
- `USER_CANCELLED` - User dismissed
- `PASS_ALREADY_EXISTS` - Already in wallet

### Checking Existing Pass

```typescript
import { containsPass } from 'expo-passkite';

const exists = await containsPass(
  'pass.com.example.app',
  'SERIAL-001'
);
```

---

## 10. EVENTS

### Subscribing to Events

```typescript
import { onPassAdded, onPassRemoved } from 'expo-passkite';

const addedSub = onPassAdded((event) => {
  console.log('Added:', event.passTypeIdentifier, event.serialNumber);
});

const removedSub = onPassRemoved((event) => {
  console.log('Removed:', event.passTypeIdentifier, event.serialNumber);
});

// Cleanup
addedSub.remove();
removedSub.remove();
```

### Event Type

```typescript
interface PassEvent {
  passTypeIdentifier: string;
  serialNumber: string;
}
```

---

## 11. COMPLETE TYPESCRIPT TYPES

### PassField

```typescript
interface PassField {
  key: string;
  label?: string;
  value: string | number | Date;
  attributedValue?: string;
  changeMessage?: string;
  textAlignment?: TextAlignment;
  dateStyle?: DateStyle;
  timeStyle?: TimeStyle;
  isRelative?: boolean;
  ignoresTimeZone?: boolean;
  numberStyle?: NumberStyle;
  currencyCode?: string;
  dataDetectorTypes?: DataDetectorType[];
  semantics?: FieldSemantics;
  row?: number;
}
```

### Enums

```typescript
enum PassType {
  BoardingPass = 'boardingPass',
  Coupon = 'coupon',
  EventTicket = 'eventTicket',
  StoreCard = 'storeCard',
  Generic = 'generic',
}

enum TransitType {
  Air = 'PKTransitTypeAir',
  Boat = 'PKTransitTypeBoat',
  Bus = 'PKTransitTypeBus',
  Train = 'PKTransitTypeTrain',
  Generic = 'PKTransitTypeGeneric',
}

enum BarcodeFormat {
  QR = 'PKBarcodeFormatQR',
  PDF417 = 'PKBarcodeFormatPDF417',
  Aztec = 'PKBarcodeFormatAztec',
  Code128 = 'PKBarcodeFormatCode128',
}

enum PassImageType {
  Icon = 'icon',
  Logo = 'logo',
  Strip = 'strip',
  Background = 'background',
  Thumbnail = 'thumbnail',
  Footer = 'footer',
}

enum TextAlignment {
  Left = 'PKTextAlignmentLeft',
  Center = 'PKTextAlignmentCenter',
  Right = 'PKTextAlignmentRight',
  Natural = 'PKTextAlignmentNatural',
}

enum DateStyle {
  None = 'PKDateStyleNone',
  Short = 'PKDateStyleShort',
  Medium = 'PKDateStyleMedium',
  Long = 'PKDateStyleLong',
  Full = 'PKDateStyleFull',
}

enum NumberStyle {
  Decimal = 'PKNumberStyleDecimal',
  Percent = 'PKNumberStylePercent',
  Scientific = 'PKNumberStyleScientific',
  SpellOut = 'PKNumberStyleSpellOut',
}
```

---

## 12. EXAMPLES

### Complete Store Card Example

```typescript
import {
  createPassBuilder,
  createPass,
  PassType,
  BarcodeFormat,
  PassImageType,
  addPassToWallet,
  canAddPasses,
} from 'expo-passkite';

async function createLoyaltyCard() {
  // 1. Build pass data
  const builder = createPassBuilder()
    .setIdentifiers({
      passTypeIdentifier: 'pass.com.example.coffee',
      serialNumber: `CARD-${Date.now()}`,
      teamIdentifier: 'ABCD123456',
    })
    .setOrganization({
      organizationName: 'Coffee House',
      description: 'Rewards Card',
      logoText: 'Coffee House',
    })
    .setPassType(PassType.StoreCard)
    .setColors({
      backgroundColor: 'rgb(139, 69, 19)',
      foregroundColor: 'rgb(255, 255, 255)',
      labelColor: 'rgb(220, 200, 180)',
    })
    .addPrimaryField({
      key: 'points',
      label: 'POINTS',
      value: '500',
    })
    .addSecondaryField({
      key: 'name',
      label: 'MEMBER',
      value: 'Jane Smith',
    })
    .addAuxiliaryField({
      key: 'level',
      label: 'STATUS',
      value: 'Gold Member',
    })
    .addBackField({
      key: 'terms',
      label: 'Terms',
      value: 'Points expire after 12 months.',
    })
    .addBarcode({
      format: BarcodeFormat.QR,
      message: 'https://coffee.example.com/card/500',
      altText: 'Scan for rewards',
    });

  // 2. Add images
  builder.addImage({ type: PassImageType.Icon, data: iconBuffer });
  builder.addImage({ type: PassImageType.Logo, data: logoBuffer });
  builder.addImage({ type: PassImageType.Strip, data: stripBuffer });

  const { passData, images } = builder.build();

  // 3. Create pass instance
  const pass = createPass(passData, images);

  // 4. Sign
  pass.setSigningCredentials({
    signerCertificate: CERT_PEM,
    signerKey: KEY_PEM,
  });

  // 5. Generate and add to wallet
  const base64 = await pass.generateBase64();

  if (await canAddPasses()) {
    const result = await addPassToWallet(base64);
    return result.success;
  }
  return false;
}
```

### Boarding Pass Example

```typescript
const builder = createPassBuilder()
  .setIdentifiers({
    passTypeIdentifier: 'pass.com.airline.boarding',
    serialNumber: 'FLIGHT-AA123',
    teamIdentifier: 'ABCD123456',
  })
  .setOrganization({
    organizationName: 'Example Airlines',
    description: 'Boarding Pass',
  })
  .setPassType(PassType.BoardingPass)
  .setTransitType(TransitType.Air)
  .setColors({
    backgroundColor: 'rgb(0, 51, 102)',
    foregroundColor: 'rgb(255, 255, 255)',
  })
  .addHeaderField({
    key: 'gate',
    label: 'GATE',
    value: 'A12',
  })
  .addPrimaryField({
    key: 'origin',
    label: 'SAN FRANCISCO',
    value: 'SFO',
  })
  .addPrimaryField({
    key: 'destination',
    label: 'NEW YORK',
    value: 'JFK',
  })
  .addSecondaryField({
    key: 'passenger',
    label: 'PASSENGER',
    value: 'JOHN DOE',
  })
  .addAuxiliaryField({
    key: 'boarding',
    label: 'BOARDING',
    value: '10:30 AM',
  })
  .addAuxiliaryField({
    key: 'seat',
    label: 'SEAT',
    value: '23A',
  })
  .addBarcode({
    format: BarcodeFormat.PDF417,
    message: 'M1DOE/JOHN         AA 123 SFOJFK...',
  });
```

### Event Ticket Example

```typescript
const builder = createPassBuilder()
  .setIdentifiers({
    passTypeIdentifier: 'pass.com.venue.ticket',
    serialNumber: 'TICKET-2024-001',
    teamIdentifier: 'ABCD123456',
  })
  .setOrganization({
    organizationName: 'Concert Venue',
    description: 'Concert Ticket',
  })
  .setPassType(PassType.EventTicket)
  .setColors({
    backgroundColor: 'rgb(30, 30, 30)',
    foregroundColor: 'rgb(255, 255, 255)',
  })
  .addPrimaryField({
    key: 'event',
    label: 'EVENT',
    value: 'Rock Concert 2024',
  })
  .addSecondaryField({
    key: 'date',
    label: 'DATE',
    value: 'Dec 25, 2024',
  })
  .addSecondaryField({
    key: 'venue',
    label: 'VENUE',
    value: 'Madison Square Garden',
  })
  .addAuxiliaryField({
    key: 'seat',
    label: 'SEAT',
    value: 'Section A, Row 5, Seat 12',
  })
  .addBarcode({
    format: BarcodeFormat.QR,
    message: 'TICKET-2024-001',
  })
  .setRelevantDate(new Date('2024-12-25T19:00:00'));
```
